name: persona-studio
description: Persona Studio — one-click, session-scoped Claude personas, useful and fun. Always Claude inside.

plugins.name: claude-persona-pack
plugins.description: 22 personas: technical experts (Data Scientist, Data Engineer, Security Expert, Software Engineer, UX Expert), business & strategy (CEO, Product Manager, Financial Planner, Marketer, Legal-Savvy Reviewer), knowledge & learning (Researcher, Editor, Astronomer, Patient Teacher), modes & mentors (Taskmaster, Devil's Advocate, Zen Mentor, Deductionist, Negotiation Coach), and fun (Mad Scientist plus style-of voices). Each is session-scoped and never changes Claude's core safety or honesty.
